stories.name: Controlled
Two Options
Many Options
stories.snippet:
const ManyOptions = () => <SegmentedButton
    options={[
      { value: "day", label: "Day" },
      { value: "week", label: "Week" },
      { value: "month", label: "Month" },
      { value: "quarter", label: "Quarter" },
      { value: "year", label: "Year" },
    ]}
    value="month"
    aria-label="Select time range"
    disabled={false} />;

stories.name: Disabled
stories.snippet: const Disabled = () => <SegmentedButton options={sizeOptions} value="md" aria-label="Select size" disabled />;
